# Intake — Acme Co. evaluation

Prepared with the exec, 2026-06-18. Immutable after this checkpoint; criteria the exec later adds
from an RFP live in `derived-criteria.md`, not here.

## 1. Vendor
Acme Co. (https://acme.example). Claims to automate contract review with an AI copilot.

## 2. Goal
Cut contract-review turnaround from 5 days to 1. Success in 6–12 months: the legal team self-serves
routine NDAs.

## 3. Their top criteria
(1) data never used for training, (2) integrates with their document-management system, (3) auditable
output. Captured verbatim; scored later in "Against your priorities."

## 4. Alternatives considered
Two competitors, building internally on a foundation-model API, and doing nothing (status-quo outside
counsel).

## 5. AI-journey stage
Piloting. (Stages: Exploring / Piloting / Scaling / AI-native.)

## 6. Intent + horizon
Strategic capability, multi-year horizon — not a stopgap.

## 7. Regulated / sensitive data
Financial and client-confidential; GDPR-EU in scope; not HIPAA.

## 8. Risk posture
Capability-first: willing to trade some immediate speed to avoid lock-in.

## Calibration read
Specificity: high on compliance, lower on "agent." Fluency: medium. Met them where they were: defined
"system prompt" inline once, then mirrored their language.

## Their company (for brand discovery)
Northwind Legal Group — company domain northwind.example. Used later to auto-discover the logo and
brand colors.
